quote: Don't Let Yesterday Take Up Too Much Of Today. – Will Rogers
fact: The shortest war in history was between Zanzibar and England in 1896. Zanzibar surrendered after 38 minutes.

joke: Today a man knocked on my door and asked for a small donation towards the local swimming pool. I gave him a glass of water.
